2026-04-16T23:38:28.7026717Z   github-token: ***
2026-04-16T23:38:28.7028389Z   script: const { setupGlobals } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/setup_globals.cjs');
setupGlobals(core, github, context, exec, io, getOctokit);
const { main } = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/safe_output_handler_manager.cjs');
await main();

2026-04-16T23:38:28.7031438Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
